one_track_current.blocker: D.1 fail-closed v3 BFV share-encryption verifier

dkg_prover_time_per_party_ms.note: Fallback dry-run with demo-seeded-rng skips fail-closed verify_shares; total divided by n.

dkg_prover_time_per_wire_share_ms.note: Fallback dry-run total divided by n*(n-1) PVSS recipient-share instances.

decryption_proof_time_per_party_ms.reason: non-dry-run e2e path is blocked before decrypt proof metrics; dry-run does not emit pvss_decrypt_prove JSON

verifier_time_ms.reason: full verifier path fails closed at D.1 before stable comparison timing

proof_wire_size_bytes.reason: PVSS adapter does not expose aggregate proof/wire size in dry-run output

dkg_prover_time_per_party_ms.reason: two-track sk+e_sm DKG proof-producing path is not wired into pvthfhe-e2e/bench runner; focused batched proof test uses MockBackend and is not comparable to real one-track BFV PVSS

decryption_proof_time_per_party_ms.note: Focused real FhersBackend committed-smudge API test wall time; includes setup/keygen/encrypt and is not a per-party proof-only timing.

fold_compression_time_ms.reason: two-track committed-smudge fold/compression is not exposed by a benchmark runner

verifier_time_ms.reason: batched two-track verification intentionally delegates to D.1 v3 verifier and fails closed

proof_wire_size_bytes.reason: focused tests do not emit proof/wire byte counts

dkg_proof_producing_path_two_track_over_.reason: No fair apples-to-apples two-track committed-smudge DKG benchmark runner exists on this branch, and full one-track verification remains D.1 fail-closed.

gate.target: Two-track overhead <= 1.5x one-track PVTHFHE for DKG proof-producing path
gate.explanation: The current branch can produce one-track dry-run timing only with demo-seeded-rng verification bypass; the normal path fails closed at D.1. Two-track sk/e_sm proof surfaces and committed-smudge decrypt APIs have focused tests, but no integrated real-BFV e2e benchmark runner emits comparable DKG proof-producing timings or wire sizes. The target is therefore neither met nor failed by this fallback artifact.

performance_advantage.statement: The intended PVTHFHE performance advantage is not demonstrated by this artifact. Current data quantify only fallback/dry-run one-track costs and focused non-comparable two-track probes; fair real-BFV two-track DKG overhead remains blocked by D.1 and missing integrated benchmark output.
